column1: This spreadsheet for 2018-19 F150 ABS but probably applies to 2020 also

column5: VIN
Wheelbase (inches): 0=Reserved, 1=122in, 2=141in, 3=145in, 4=157in, 5=163in, 7=133in
Payload Package: 0=Reserved, 1=Base Payload, 2=Mid Payload, 3=Heavy Duty Payload
Engine: 0=reserved, 1=2.7L GTDI, 2=3.3L NA, 3=3.5L GTDI, 4=5.0L NA, 5=3.0L TD (diesel), 6=3.5L GTDI High Output, 7=reserved
Steering Gear: 0=Reserved, 1=EPAS 17:1, 2=EPAS 21:1
Trailer Tow: 0=Reserved, 1=BaseMedium, Heavy Duty, Max Duty 2=Towing Pack 1 [MFAL C1CAQ]
Suspension: 0-7=Not Used
Vehicle Line: 0=BaseMFAL AAAHB, 1=PoliceMFAL AAAHB, 2=RaptorMFAL AAAPN
Rear Axle: 0=reserved, 1=Open MFAL EGJAB (non-limited slip), 2=eLocker MFAL EGJAL (electric locking)

Driveline: 0=Reserved, 1=4x2 [MFAL FMLAA (Less Transfer Case)], 2=ESOF [MFAL FMLAS (Electric Transfer Case w/IWE's)], 3=2TOD [MFAL FMLAT (4x4 2spd Trans Case w/TOD)], 4=2TOD4H [MFAL FMLAX (2spd TOD w/4HI-LOC)]
Transmission: 0=Reserved, 1=6R80 [MFAL TR-C3 (6spd Auto Trans)], 2=10R80 [MFAL TR-EU (10spd Auto Trans)]
Parking Brake: 0=reserved, 1=ElectricLight MFAL FAJAK, 2=ElectricMedium MFAL FAJAL
GearShift Type: 0-7=not used
Reserved
Reserved
Reserved

column5: ACC without=ACC MFAL GTDAA (less speed control), MFAL GTDAB (speed control)
ACC with=ACC S&G MFAL GTDAK (adaptive speed control w/CADSIII)
CMbB without=not used/collision mitigation system standard equipment
CMbB with=CMbBMFAL FBFAB (collision mitigation system) MFAL FBFAC (collision mitigation system #2)
HDC with=MFAL FECAB (ABS HDC) with TCFMAL FECAD (ABS Trail Control)
EPB DAR (Drive Away Release): 0=without, 1=with
